name: agent-buildprint

scripts.check: rm -rf /tmp/agb-check-smoke && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke/code',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke/blueprint.yaml', \"purpose: test\\nruntime:\\n  forbidden_dependencies:\\n    - forbidden-runtime\\nstate:\\n  required_fields:\\n    - done\\nnodes:\\n  act:\\n    input:\\n      reads:\\n        - messages\\n    output:\\n      writes:\\n        - done\\n    side_effects: []\\nedges:\\n  - from: start\\n    to: act\\n  - from: act\\n    to: end\\nacceptance_criteria:\\n  - passes check\\n\"); fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke/code/index.js','export const ok = true;\\n')" && node ./bin/agb.js check /tmp/agb-check-smoke --code /tmp/agb-check-smoke/code
scripts.test: npm run check && rm -rf /tmp/agb-map-smoke /tmp/agb-start-smoke && node ./bin/agb.js map . --out /tmp/agb-map-smoke && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/BUILDPRINT.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/SPEC.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/PLAN.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/CONTRACTS.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/TEST_MATRIX.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/VALIDATION_TEMPLATE.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/plans/00-review-facts.md && node ./bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/ai-influencer-os/package.json /tmp/agb-start-smoke && test -s /tmp/agb-start-smoke/.buildprint/snapshots/BUILDPRINT.md && test -s /tmp/agb-start-smoke/.buildprint/snapshots/plans/04-wavespeed-image.md
scripts.pack:smoke: npm pack --dry-run && rm -rf /tmp/agb-pack-smoke && mkdir /tmp/agb-pack-smoke && npm pack --pack-destination /tmp/agb-pack-smoke >/tmp/agb-pack-smoke/pack.out && cd /tmp/agb-pack-smoke && npm init -y >/dev/null && npm install ./agent-buildprint-*.tgz >/dev/null && ./node_modules/.bin/agb --help >/dev/null

description: CLI for bootstrapping, checking, and mapping Agent Buildprints for coding agents.
